steps.title: Identify the comparison
steps.content: Bird-Walton accomplished much, but "there is little that can ______ being the first to do something" — meaning few things outdo or surpass being first. The Wanderwell example reinforces that being first to do something is what people remember.

steps.title: Match the precise phrase
steps.content:
Prevail over means triumph or have advantage over — exactly the relationship: little can outdo "being the first." Overreach by, fluctuate with, and constrain within don't carry the meaning of surpassing.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
